hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in 'git commit'*|*' git commit'*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cfg=lessons-learned.config.json; [ -f "$cfg" ] || cfg=.claude-plugin/lessons-learned.config.json; kb_root=$(jq -r '.knowledgeBaseRoot // "docs/lessons-learned"' "$cfg" 2>/dev/null || echo 'docs/lessons-learned'); enabled=$(jq -r '.preCommitHook != false' "$cfg" 2>/dev/null || echo true); [ "$enabled" = 'true' ] || exit 0; staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0; touches_kb=$(echo "$staged" | grep -c "^$kb_root/" || true); [ "$touches_kb" -gt 0 ] && exit 0; top_dirs=$(echo "$staged" | awk -F/ 'NF>1{print $1}' | sort -u | wc -l); [ "$top_dirs" -ge 2 ] || exit 0; printf '{"systemMessage":"This commit spans %s top-level areas and does not touch %s. Consider whether the underlying problem-solving qualifies as a lesson learned. Run /lesson-add if so, or ignore."}' "$top_dirs" "$kb_root"; exit 0
